title: Screenshot Review Data
description: Data describing component screenshots for the review gallery. Generated by scanning __screenshots__/ directories.

title.description: Title shown in the gallery header

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

cosmosBaseUrl.description: Base URL for React Cosmos (e.g., http://localhost:5000). null to hide Cosmos links.

screenshotBaseDir.description: Relative path from the HTML output to the directory containing ComponentName.__screenshots__/ dirs

borderInset.description: Border artifact inset as CSS percentages, applied via clip-path to all screenshots

component.description: Component name (matches the directory prefix, e.g., ChoreCard)

variant.description: Slugified variant name (matches the PNG filename without extension)

displayName.description: Human-readable variant name (e.g., 'Daily chore'). Used for Cosmos fixture links.

fixturePath.description: Relative path to the fixture file (e.g., src/components/ChoreCard.fixture.tsx). Used for Cosmos links.

modes.description: Which color modes have screenshots available

contentAspectRatio.description: Auto-detected aspect ratio (width/height) of the content area, for CSS cropping of blank space
